summary: Completed testing of Iteration 50 - Quick Links Bar, Members Manager Register Column, and Analytics Login Tracking. All 17 backend API tests passed. All frontend features verified working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: Console warning: 'In HTML, <span> cannot be a child of <tbody>' in MembersManager.js - likely from React dev tools injection, not a code issue
seed_data_creation: 4 quick links already seeded: Home (/), KMS (new tab), News (new tab), Backend (/admin)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 50 features fully tested. Quick Links Bar in My Account header shows 4 seeded links (Home, KMS, News, Backend) with dividers and external link icons for new_tab links. CMS admin /admin/quick-links has full CRUD with drag-and-drop reorder, toggle active, and new tab settings. Members Manager table has 'Register' column showing created_at date. Analytics monthly_logins now uses member_logins collection with MongoDB aggregation ($group by member_id, $count) to count unique members per month instead of last_login field.

backend_apis.GET /api/public/myaccount-links: PASS - Returns active links sorted by order (4 seeded links)
backend_apis.GET /api/admin/myaccount-links: PASS - Returns all links (active and inactive)
backend_apis.POST /api/admin/myaccount-links: PASS - Creates new link with auto-incrementing order
backend_apis.PUT /api/admin/myaccount-links/{id}: PASS - Updates link properties including active/new_tab
backend_apis.PUT /api/admin/myaccount-links-reorder: PASS - Reorders links by ordered_ids array
backend_apis.GET /api/admin/members: PASS - Returns members with created_at field for Register column
backend_apis.POST /api/member/login: PASS - Inserts into member_logins collection for tracking
backend_apis.GET /api/admin/analytics: PASS - monthly_logins uses $group/$count on member_logins collection

frontend_myaccount.quick_links_bar: PASS - data-testid='quick-links-bar' shows links with dividers
frontend_myaccount.breadcrumb: PASS - Breadcrumb visible below quick links bar

frontend_admin_quick_links.link_editor: PASS - data-testid='quick-link-editor' with label, url, new_tab, active fields
frontend_admin_quick_links.drag_handles: PASS - Drag handles visible for reordering
frontend_admin_quick_links.toggle_active: PASS - Eye icon toggles active status
frontend_admin_quick_links.edit_delete: PASS - Pencil and trash icons for edit/delete

frontend_members_manager.register_column: PASS - 'Register' column in table headers showing created_at dates
